violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Empanadas were observed held at 117-130 degrees Fahrenheit in the hot hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per owner, empanadas were placed in the hot hold unit about 30 minutes prior to inspection. Empanadas were reheated to above 165 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The temperature of the hot hold unit was turned up at time of inspection. Establishment must monitor the temperatures of the empanadas. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Deli ham was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
Onions and sugar were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

The hot hold unit was not holding food at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above during time of inspection. The ambient air temperature was initially observed at 140 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The owner turned up the temperature and it was observed at 160 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Establishment must monitor the ambient air and food temperatures. If hot hold unit can not maintain an internal food temperature of 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above, establishment must discontinue using the hot hold unit and get it repaired/replaced/adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
The handle on the hot hold unit was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2024

The condensate from the Freezer refrigeration unit is frosting in excess inside of the unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment must defrost freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
